---
title: "Prospect Comps"
format:
  html:
    title-block-banner: false
---

```{=html}
<main class="app-shell">
  <section class="search-panel" aria-labelledby="app-title">
    <div>
      <p class="eyebrow">Minor League Similarity Search</p>
      <h1 id="app-title">Prospect Comps</h1>
      <p class="lede">Search historical minor league hitters and compare each player's career-to-date minor league profile against its ten closest matches.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="search-box">
      <label for="player-search">Player</label>
      <input id="player-search" type="search" autocomplete="off" placeholder="Type a player name" disabled>
      <div id="status-line" class="status-line">Loading database...</div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="content-grid" aria-live="polite">
    <aside class="results-panel">
      <div class="panel-header">
        <h2>Matches</h2>
        <span id="result-count">0</span>
      </div>
      <div id="player-results" class="player-results"></div>
    </aside>

    <section class="detail-panel">
      <div id="empty-state" class="empty-state">
        <h2>Select a player</h2>
        <p>Each profile combines the player's minor league seasons with denominator weights, recency weights, age context, and level context.</p>
      </div>

      <div id="comparison-view" class="comparison-view hidden">
        <div class="selected-player">
          <div>
            <p class="eyebrow">Selected Player</p>
            <h2 id="selected-name"></h2>
          </div>
          <dl id="selected-meta" class="selected-meta"></dl>
        </div>

        <div class="table-wrap">
          <table>
            <thead>
              <tr>
                <th>Rank</th>
                <th>Player</th>
                <th>Score</th>
                <th>PA</th>
                <th>Levels</th>
                <th>ZBB</th>
                <th>ZK</th>
                <th>ZISO</th>
                <th>Speed</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody id="comparison-body"></tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  </section>
</main>
```
